title: Version Manifest
description: Tracks version metadata for governance framework updates in consuming repos.

version.description: Semantic version tag (e.g., v1.5.0) or commit SHA if untagged.

commit_sha.description: Full commit SHA of the submodule at this version.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the update was applied.

previous_version.description: Previous version or commit SHA before this update.

previous_commit_sha.description: Previous commit SHA before this update.

changelog_summary.description: Summary of changes included in this update.

breaking_changes.description: Whether breaking changes were detected in this update.

drift_detected.description: Whether local drift from upstream was detected.
